Test Case Description: Verify mini cart icon is displayed
Expected Result: Mini cart/cart icon is visible in header

Test Case Description: Verify mini cart opens when clicking cart icon
Expected Result: Mini cart panel/dropdown opens correctly

Test Case Description: Verify mini cart can be closed
Steps: 1. Click close icon or outside panel
Expected Result: Mini cart closes correctly

Test Case Description: Verify empty mini cart state
Expected Result: Empty cart message and continue shopping CTA are displayed

Test Case Description: Verify cart count is correct when cart is empty
Expected Result: Cart count is hidden or shows 0 according to design

Test Case Description: Verify cart count updates after adding product
Steps: 1. Add product from PDP/PLP 2. Observe cart icon
Expected Result: Cart count updates correctly

Test Case Description: Verify added product is displayed in mini cart
Expected Result: Product is displayed in mini cart

Test Case Description: Verify product image is displayed
Expected Result: Product image is visible and not broken

Test Case Description: Verify product name is displayed
Expected Result: Product name is visible and correct

Test Case Description: Verify product variant details are displayed
Expected Result: Selected size, colour, or variant details are displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify product price is displayed
Expected Result: Product price is visible and formatted correctly for AU/NZ

Test Case Description: Verify sale price is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Sale price/original price is displayed correctly where applicable

Test Case Description: Verify product image/name redirects to PDP
Steps: 1. Open mini cart 2. Click product image/name
Expected Result: Correct PDP opens

Test Case Description: Verify quantity is displayed correctly
Expected Result: Item quantity is displayed correctly

Test Case Description: Verify decreasing quantity updates mini cart
Expected Result: Quantity, item subtotal, cart count, and totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify quantity cannot be set below minimum

Expected Result: Quantity is rejected or remove flow is triggered as designed

Expected Result: Validation message is displayed and quantity is not updated incorrectly

Expected Result: Validation message is displayed and mini cart remains stable

Expected Result: Product is removed and totals/cart count update correctly

Expected Result: Empty mini cart state is displayed correctly

Expected Result: Subtotal is visible and calculated correctly

Expected Result: Discount is displayed correctly if mini cart supports discount display

Test Case Description: Verify total updates after quantity change
Expected Result: Mini cart totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify total updates after item removal
Expected Result: Mini cart totals update correctly

Test Case Description: Verify View Cart button is displayed
Expected Result: View Cart CTA is visible

Test Case Description: Verify View Cart button redirects to cart page
Expected Result: User is redirected to cart page

Expected Result: Checkout CTA is visible and enabled

Expected Result: User is redirected to checkout page

Expected Result: User cannot proceed and proper message is shown

Expected Result: Mini cart closes or user is redirected according to design

Test Case Description: Verify mini cart opens or updates after adding product

Expected Result: Mini cart opens or cart count/notification updates according to design

Expected Result: Correct product and selected variant are displayed

Expected Result: Payment messaging such as PayPal/Afterpay/BNPL appears according to eligibility

Test Case Description: Verify payment messaging updates by cart total

Test Case Description: Verify mini cart opens within acceptable time
Expected Result: Mini cart opens within acceptable threshold

Expected Result: Mini cart updates within acceptable threshold

Expected Result: Mini cart remains stable

Test Case Description: Verify repeated quantity updates do not break mini cart
Expected Result: Mini cart state remains accurate and stable

Expected Result: User-friendly error is displayed and page remains stable
